programme.desc: As a popular actress has growing discontentment towards her marriage, she begins planning to kill her rich husband with her neighbor.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: Boy in the Pool
programme.desc: Seok-young bumps into Woo-ju and they get closer after Woo-ju saves her from drowning. They lost touch after Woo-ju moves to Seoul to be a swimmer. Will they be able to meet again?

programme.title: Big Match
programme.desc: A man framed for murder battles a game planner who is intent on turning a city into one giant game board that he can control.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: Miss Fortune
programme.desc: Swindler Jihye is looking to make her last big score. Together with her daughter, they infiltrate the house of a cultural property broker who has a net worth of 60 billion won.

programme.title: The Negotiation
programme.desc: An arms dealer kidnapped two Koreans in Bangkok where the hostages were in fact held in an abandoned children's home in South Korea, when the kidnapper's motivations becomes clearer.

programme.title: Waiting for Rain
programme.desc: An unmotivated student regains his passion for life after exchanging letters with his childhood friend and promise to meet if it rains on December 31st each year.

programme.title: The Spies
programme.desc: Kim, a North Korean spy who had lived in South Korea for 22 years is suddenly contacted by his superior. His team plans to complete an earlier mission and steal the target's large stockpile of cash.

programme.title: The Noisy Mansion
programme.desc: Geo-ul moves into the mysterious apartment plagued by unexplained floor noise. Determined to solve the mystery, she faces unexpected challenges while uncovering the apartment's secrets.

programme.title: Waiting for Rain
programme.desc: An unmotivated student regains his passion for life after exchanging letters with his childhood friend and promise to meet if it rains on December 31st each year.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Kang-jin is bullied as the lowest-ranking boy at school with no presence and money. He starts a business on private loans by chance and soon rises to the top of the school hierarchy.

programme.title: The Magician
programme.desc: A talented young magician falls for a princess betrothed to his former teacher, leading to a fierce showdown between the two powerful magicians.

programme.title: The Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: When a former police investigator from Busan suspects something off about a slick businessman from Seoul, the “sheriff” resolves to track his every move in order to keep his town safe.

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: Cheer Up, Mr. Lee!
programme.desc: Unlike his heart-throb appearances, Mr. Lee, who has very child-like characteristics, embarks on a voyage of discovery with his young daughter ‘Saet-byeol’ whom he has just met.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Seoul falls into chaos as a devil-worshipping cult summons an ancient demon Asmodeus. “Holy Night”, the demon-hunting trio, unleash their power to battle against the cult enforcers and the demon in order to save a possessed girl from Asmodeus.

programme.title: Il Mare
programme.desc: A young woman from 1999 and a young man from 1997 begin a parallel-time love story separated by a span of two years when they start to receive each other's letters in the mailbox.

programme.title: You Will Die in 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun-woo tells Jung-yoon that she'll be stabbed to death in 6 hours. She doubts his words but still wants to find out the truth. She later realizes he is related to serial killings...

programme.title: Shoot Me in the Heart
programme.desc: A young man develops schizophrenia after his mother's suicide. After he meets a kindred spirit at the psychiatric hospital, he forges a plan with the man to escape.

programme.title: Race to Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Dong-hwan wants to uncover the mystery behind his mother's death after her skeletal remains have been discovered. The long-buried memories of her co-workers reveal a hidden truth...

programme.title: The Odd Family: Zombie on Sale

programme.title: Where Would You Like to Go?
programme.desc: A tragic accident claims the lives of a teacher. His widow seeks solace in a trip to Warsaw, where an unexpected reunion and a letter bring hope to her journey of healing and rediscovery.

programme.title: Ordinary Person
programme.desc: Sung-jin is a police officer involved in a conspiracy after he arrested a suspected murderer by chance. Gyu-nam make use of Sung-jin's weakness, his family, to strike a deal with him.

programme.title: Worst Woman
programme.desc: Eun-hee is an actress with poor acting and she acts in her life. She creates different characters when she dates a man. Eventually, her lies are tangled up and everything is messed up...

programme.title: Only God Knows Everything
programme.desc: Do-woon has just been ordained. A man admits to killing his mother during confession. Torn between his duty as a priest and his desire for revenge as a son, he faces a demonic group...

programme.desc: Yoon-joo, a rookie detective, joins a crime unit specialises in surveillance activities of high-profile criminals. They work together and track down a dangerous robber and his crew.

programme.title: Road to Boston
programme.desc: A group of marathoners want to run proudly under the Korean flag after Korea's liberation. Though they couldn't afford a pair of sneakers, they embark on an unforgettable journey to Boston.

programme.title: Punch-Drunk Love
programme.desc: Bok-seo gave up to be a soccer player after an injury. He meets Bok-hee and falls in love with her. Bok-hee feels unsure but she appreciates his sincerity, leading to something special...

programme.desc: A busker met a girl who makes decision through tossing a coin.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to “Best Fans Day” at NY’s Giraffe Stadium, where Alex gets caught up in the attention of rooting for the winning team. When his behavior ends up hurting Marty’s feelings, Alex comes to learn that the only team that matters is the one that’s made up of his friends.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The gang heads to the Museum of Dinosaurs. But Gloria becomes obsessed with her handheld video game and misses out on what's in front of her, and ends up creating a disaster of colossal proportions.

programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: In preparation for the big race to determine the next Race Cadets, Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to build their own cars. The catch? programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag wants to do something special for her Mom and Paw’s anniversary, so she recreates the boat cruise where her parents first met. \ Tag discovers that nothing is planned for Pawston’s 100th birthday, so she decides the town needs to rebuild the old Bonestand for a big Pawston concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.desc: When Sherman's friends crash the show for an impromptu beach party, he and his rival both do a trick jump over a whale shark to win over a girl

programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water

programme.desc: On their first day at Palomino Bluffs, the girls are determined to make a good impression. Cue the beachfront race — and a daring rescue!

programme.desc: When Phil threatens to shut down D’Angelo’s new dragon hospital and ban dragons from ICARIS, D’Angelo and a little Hobgobbler have to change his mind.

programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.desc: When Phil detects a meteor is hurtling towards the farm, the Bettermans and Croods must decide how to spend their last day on earth.

programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.desc: When Eep wants alone time with her new friend Dawn, Guy seeks a new friend of his own and finds an unlikely companion in Thunk.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Fired from Baby Corp and trying to build their own business, Boss Baby and Tina waste all their startup funds immediately, requiring a loan from Banker Baby Benny. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Unable to land baby clients, Boss and Tina take in a naughty little puppy as a side hustle, trying to earn a little extra scrap. programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! programme.title: Abominable and The Invisible City
programme.desc: While Yi and the crew try to pinpoint how Yi’s magic works, they notice that Everest isn’t looking too hot. In fact, he’s too hot. The crew tries everything to cool him down, even begging their old foe, Burnish, for help. Out of options, Yi tries to use her magic to send Everest home – until Burnish and his jerboa sidekick, Duchess, reveal that they’ve made over the kids’ rooftop fort into a high-tech HQ, complete with various tech gadgets for the crew and a temperature-controlled chamber for Everest.

programme.title: Madly Madagascar
programme.desc: Romance is in the air for Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman after King Julien discovers a magical perfume and takes on the role as "King of Love."

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: When Santa unexpectedly crash lands on the island, giving the jolly gentleman a case of amnesia - it's up to those zany zoosters to save Christmas!

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Prince Barty and Princess Julienne, King Julien's needy and dramatic parents, must take over for their son when he's held captive on a pirate ship

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: As Mort and Clover search for their leader, King Julien shows off his pirate booty moves and convinces the pirates he should be captain of the ship.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: D-Structs traps the Dinotrux in a deep sinkhole pit – but he overlooks tiny Revvit, who comes up with a plan to help his much-bigger friends.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Just as Ty Rux welcomes Garby, a loud and smelly Stegarbasaurus, to the crater, Revvit disappears and the gang embarks on a dangerous rescue mission.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: When White Shadow is invited to play a daring sport against his hero, an athletic dung beetle, the crew is worried he doesn't know the game is fixed. // Chet gets taken by a con artist gecko and bets Turbo's shell. When Turbo is challenged, he must go slow to try to beat the gecko at his own game.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Accidental Hero In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice. Rich Kid Ra When Ra pulls up to Scare School in a solid gold chariot, everyone suddenly wants to be his best friend.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dragon Quest The unlucky staff of a medieval-themed restaurant in Deedstown, get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. Opposite Day When Wolfie's experiment with moonlight goes awry, everyone but Casper turns into his or her opposite.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Go Go With Mr. Paik
programme.desc: Korean star chef Paik Jong-won, together with Onew, Jung Chae-yeon, Lee Seung-hoon and Gong Seung-yeon are travelling to Malaysia, Thailand and Singapore, enjoying their holiday as well as exploring local markets for exotic ingredients to cook their meals.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.desc: Instead of a rifle, he grabs a kitchen knife! Private Kang Seong-jae uses a mysterious gaming quest system to transform into a legendary military cook soldier.

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: Two hitmen band together to find a rouge assassin for whom there is a large bounty placed

programme.title: Heart of Dragon
programme.desc: Story of a cop who forsakes his dream of sailing around the world so he can care for his mentally retarded brother

programme.title: The Vanishing
programme.desc: Three lighthouse keepers on the remote Flannan Isles find a hidden trunk of gold that becomes the catalyst to a struggle for survival

programme.title: The Master (Jet Li)
programme.desc: A former Chinese Kung Fu master working in L.A. as a medicine man is targeted by an ex-student, and it's up to one of his Hong Kong disciples, who's visiting America, to defend his master's honor.

programme.title: Daemuga
programme.desc: The 3 Shaman battle their skills to seize redevelopment district and compete to be the best shaman.

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: An ex-contract killer is forced to assassinate three men and make them look like accidents by his arch-rival, who kidnaps his girlfriend and threatens to kill her.

programme.title: Tower of Death
programme.desc: After his brother is killed while hunting the murderers of a friend, a young man seeks to bring the perpetrators to justice.

programme.title: Karate Kill
programme.desc: A Japanese martial artist goes searching for his sister, who has gone missing in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Steel Rain 2: Summit
programme.desc: A general holds the U.S. president and the leaders of North Korea and South Korea hostage on a submarine.

programme.title: Never Here
programme.desc: Disturbing events lead an artist who photographs strangers to suspect that someone out there is watching HER. Boundaries blur between real and imaginary, crime and art, the watcher and the watched.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

programme.title: Mukoku
programme.desc: Kengo was also accomplished in kendo, but he stopped participating in the martial art activity after an incident. Now, he spends his days drinking and working as a security guard at a station building. Based on novel "Mukoku" by Shu Fujisawa.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A young man seeks vengeance for the death of his teacher

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: Based on the October 1997 Loomis Fargo robbery, A guard at an armored car company in the Southern U.S. organizes one of the biggest bank heists in American history.
A historical drama based on the founding of the Republic of China when nationalist forces led by Sun Yat-sen overthrew the Qing Dynasty.

programme.title: The Golden Holiday
programme.desc: Byeong-Soo works as a detective in the countryside and takes his family on a trip to the Philippines. He becomes involved in a crime planned by Patric, becoming a murder suspect.

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

programme.title: Armour of God
programme.desc: A treasure hunter and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organization of monks

programme.title: Citizen of a Kind
programme.desc: After a fire destroys her laundromat, a single mother is tricked by a voice phishing scheme. She decides to investigate the criminals behind it.

programme.title: Den of Thieves
programme.desc: An elite unit of LA County Sheriff's Department have to stop a notorious crew of expert thieves from robbing the impenetrable Federal Reserve Bank.

programme.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: City War
programme.desc: Two cops – both partners and best friends – find their friendship and their lives at stake when they try to take down a ruthless drug dealer

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by human traffickers.

programme.title: Guimoon: The Lightless Door
programme.desc: A renowned paranormal investigator explores an abandoned training center where a custodian murdered all of the guests in 1990. Joined by three college students aiming for the money prize of a video competition , he uncovers a buried secrets.

programme.title: Night of the Sicario
programme.desc: Taylor is forced to hide the young daughter of a Colombian woman in witness protection who will be testifying against a powerful drug cartel in Federal Court, as ruthless sicarios aim to hunt them down.

programme.title: The Point Men
programme.desc: A Korean diplomat is dispatched to Afghanistan when a group of South Korean tourists is taken hostage by the Taliban. When all measures fail and one hostage is killed, he is forced to team up with a special agent to rescue the survivors.

programme.title: Tiger on Beat
programme.desc: A drug dealer joins forces with two mismatched cops to crack a band of heroin dealers.

programme.title: Boyka: Undisputed 4
programme.desc: An underground fighter fights brutal matches to protect the widow of a man he unintentionally killed in the ring.

programme.title: Night of the Undead
programme.desc: So Hee married the perfect man but while she looks into the secret of his everlasting stamina, she finds out she's about to be killed by him and joins powers with her friends in order to kill him first.

programme.title: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: American Ranger John Cutter seeks revenge against the notorious Ukrainian arms dealer responsible for his demise.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: John Rambo's peaceful life is interrupted when Gabriela, his friend's granddaughter, disappears in Mexico. He decided to free her from the clutches of local cartels, starting a cycle of revenge

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: In a city rife with injustice, an ex-cop seeks redemption and revenge after being double-crossed and then framed by its most powerful figure

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food

programme.title: Serenity
programme.desc: A fishing boat captain's peaceful life shattered as his ex-wife begs for his help- asking him to kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: A man inherits an ancestral mansion and an ancient curse stemming back to the Crusades. As he battles to keep demons in the house at bay, he tries to awaken the beautiful Briar Rose to rescue her from a terrifying netherworld.

programme.title: Mojin: The Lost Legend
programme.desc: Three grave robbers explore a lost underground kingdom to find a powerful charm.

programme.title: The Limit
programme.desc: Police Officer So-Eun takes part in the investigation and acts as stand-in for a kidnapped child's mother. So-Eun receives a shocking phone call, her son was olso kidnapped by the same group.

programme.title: Death Forest 3 and Death Forest 4
programme.desc: Uchida Mayu is a high school student in a peaceful town near Tokyo. Meanwhile,, Mayu's uncle Uchida Kazuki is a freelancer writer, who chases after the hideous monster Yoshie who attacks people.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is on hold as summer continues, with unexpectedly balmy conditions throwing a life line to the roe deer as they prepare for the winter ahead. For other animals, mating season has arrived, making for a testosterone-fuelled time at Ravenscar Beach.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: Despite its delayed arrival, for the Grey Seals at Ravenscar Beach winter means it is time to give birth. The newborn pups are now on the fast track to adulthood, with just three weeks to gain as much weight as possible before their mothers move on.

programme.title: Inheritors

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Scaled (S1)
programme.desc: Just south of Cornel' World, reptile and amphibian lover and rescuer, Stevie, enlists the team to come up with a sci-fi fantasy themed enclosure for her Basilisk lizard.

programme.title: Wild Winners (S1)
programme.desc: Prominent calls and sounds, iridescent colours and acrobatic flying skills; these classic features make up our view of birds.

programme.title: Wild Dubai
programme.desc: Behind modern Dubai lies a hidden treasure -an incredible wildlife that speaks of a timeless connection to the desert,the sea and the history and tradition of its people.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet (S4)
programme.desc: A cat with a shattered paw needs Dr. Jeff's help to walk again. Dr. Baier treats a rescued opossum in need of a new home.

programme.title: The Snake Tracker (S1)
programme.desc: On the volcanic slopes of the Sunda Islands, dozens of reptiles thrive in this archipelago paradise.

programme.title: Wild Assassins (S2)
programme.desc: Sprawling across the globe are tropical rainforests - a humid, vibrant and colourful biome that is home to some of the deadliest animals on the planet.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That? (S1)
programme.desc: In this episode we ask: why have monkeys turned to a life of crime? Why do scorpions glow in the dark?

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That? (S1)
programme.desc: how do sheep dogs wrangle sheep? Why are moths attracted to flames? Why do turtles cry? Why do sea otters bond with stones?

programme.title: Cats 101 (S3)
programme.desc: Meet the Bambino, Pixie Bob, Australian Mist, Domestic Longhair, Cats Gone Wild, Cheetoh, and Napoleon.

programme.title: Japan's Wild Side (S1)
programme.desc: This pure wildlife docuseries travels from Hokkaido's vast forests to the lush coastlines of Okinawa.

programme.title: China's Wild Secrets (S1)
programme.desc: In southwestern China, towering mountains provide shelter for nearly 2,000 wild giant pandas.

programme.title: Saving Britain’s Wildlife (S1)
programme.desc: Animal Collection Officer, Paige Burnham, must overcome her fear of heights to rescue a crow trapped in netting on the roof of a tall derelict building.

programme.title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors (S1)
programme.desc: Counting down from twenty which animals are nature's top builders; showcasing the most ingenious animal craftsmanship throughout the globe.

programme.title: Just Animals (S2)
programme.desc: Wrapped up in myths and misunderstandings, "cold-blooded" Reptiles are a diverse group with thousands of species crawling, slithering and swimming the planet.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S5)
programme.desc: George and Beth are prisoners in their own home due to their ferocious kitty Reese. Reese is a cat version of Jack the Ripper and Beth is one of his favorite targets.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S5)
programme.desc: Alan and Shannon were looking for a cat they could cuddle, but instead they got Barnabas - a hissing, flesh ripping, demon cat, calmed down only with opera music.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell (S5)
programme.desc: Marco and Aimee recently got married, but Marco's cat, Monty, is tearing them apart with his appetite for destruction, and nothing is safe.

programme.title: The Aquarium (S2)
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot.

programme.title: The Aquarium (S2)
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season.

programme.title: Wildlife SOS (S9)
programme.desc: A mystery bat is brought to the hospital and Simon says a tearful and somewhat regretful goodbye to the first barn owl he ever rescued.

programme.title: The Aquarium (S2)
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection.

programme.title: Lone Star Law (S5)
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbor in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk.

programme.title: Zambia Untamed (S1)
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But there are dangers here as the resident leopard is powerful.

programme.title: Zambia Untamed (S1)
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days

programme.desc: Recent sightings of a massive bird send Phil and Heather into western Pennsylvania to hunt the mythical Thunderbird and uncover its legendary secrets.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face a journey of epic proportions in the Bolivian Andes.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north, causing massive flooding in Appalachia. As the deluge sweeps away one woman, a man jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike takes the family on a trip down memory lane. He finds new cars for his dad and sister and helps Richard Hammond’s mum sell her MX5 for charity.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN travel to Kentucky to meet local small-tire racers racing for $5,000. The last local standing gets to take on Jerry Bird.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: One of KevDogg's favourite cars has arrived, and he leads the charge on the build. When Kev's plan doesn’t work out, he enlists the help of a local dealer.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: Drivers witness acrobatic crashes. An aggressive driver faces a big problem. A motorist dodges a bullet. An angry driver follows a woman home.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: A furious driver takes out his anger on another car. Motorcyclists deal with aggressive drivers. A biker faces off with a bat-wielding man.

programme.title: Space Race: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores the race to the moon between the US and the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: From the outside, a '57 Bel Air has all the markings of a classic but needs a lot of work. The customer also wants a bigger engine.

programme.title: Sin City Tow (S1)
programme.desc: It's NYE in Vegas and things get wild: partygoers hit Ashley's, Elmer makes a life-changing choice, and Pineapple faces his boss's wrath.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: A visit to a popular car show inspires Mike to organise his own event in an effort to promote his expanding business – but will anyone turn up?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)

programme.title: On the Way
programme.desc: A large-scale tourism programme that is designed to present rich tourism resources in China and around the world

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: Bride with the White Hair
programme.desc: Tianshan disciple Yu Luo Sha challenges the four major sects and slays their leaders, shaking the martial world. Zhuo Yihang confronts her but falls in love. When he is set to marry another, she turns white-haired and vows never to meet again.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Bride with the White Hair
programme.desc: Tianshan disciple Yu Luo Sha challenges the four major sects and slays their leaders, shaking the martial world. Zhuo Yihang confronts her but falls in love. When he is set to marry another, she turns white-haired and vows never to meet again.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: CSI S3 E01 - Revenge is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: The series enters its third season riding high as network television's top-rated drama. There is, therefore, no need for CBS to make any major cast changes, however, there are two significant additions to the cast lineup for season 3. A romantic interest is created for series regular Jorja Fox (Sara Sidle) in the form of Hank Peddigrew (Christopher Wiehl), a handsome paramedic. Also, recurring character Detective Lockwood ( Jeffrey D. Sams ) is seen on a more frequent basis. The season's most significant story development involves CSI head man Gil Grissom ( William L. Petersen ). After a few instances in which he notices that he is experiencing some hearing loss, Grissom is diagnosed with a hereditary disorder which threatens to culminate in total deafness. As the season draws to a close, Grissom undergoes surgery to correct this problem, however the results of the operation remain unclear until the beginning of season four.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: New ground-penetrating radar uncovers evidence of more structures in the swamp, and as winter approaches, the team puts a daring plan together to get into the Solution Channel for the first time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: One of China's oldest provinces with history that reaches back over 4,000 years. Anthony explores hanging coffins, wineries, and a bomb shelter.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it’s illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol—the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: As the tumultuous first week nears its end, the remaining survivalists focus on regaining their footing. One participant discovers unconventional food sources to adapt to the harsh environment.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two previous champions will face off in a gruelling five-hour challenge, making a blade inspired by Hollywood for the chance to duke it out against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: During the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters find themselves in competition to simplify the lives of homemakers across the country by creating a tasty but easy boxed cake mix.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: When the team experiences a frustrating setback, they are stunned to learn it may have led to a breakthrough discovery.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: While the team struggles to stop water from pouring into the Garden Shaft, the connection between Oak Island, Captain Phipps and The Knights Templar is rapidly intensifying on Lot 5.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two previous champions will face off in a gruelling five-hour challenge, making a blade inspired by Hollywood for the chance to duke it out against one of our titans of the forge.

programme.desc: In the late 1800s, two pharmacists 1500 miles apart race to create healthy, non-alcoholic beverage options, kickstarting the entire soda industry with their breakout hits: Hires Root Beer and Dr. Pepper.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: When the team experiences a frustrating setback, they are stunned to learn it may have led to a breakthrough discovery.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it’s illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol—the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: As the tumultuous first week nears its end, the remaining survivalists focus on regaining their footing. One participant discovers unconventional food sources to adapt to the harsh environment.

programme.title: Alone (S12)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Amidst financial troubles, Disney hires an ingenious marketing whiz who helps them figure out how to bring their beloved characters off the screen and into the hands of millions.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick sees red when a Rolex Submariner hits the counter. Will his offer make a splash, or is it just a waste of time? Meanwhile, Corey gets slap happy over a hockey stick signed by Paul Newman.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: After the team's final experiment of the year, stunning revelations are made all across Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From colossal walls and giant stone tombs to temples carved from solid rock, how did ancient civilisations achieve feats of engineering that still defy modern understanding?

programme.title: The Art Of Washoku
programme.desc: Journey into the heart of Japan's culinary heritage with this program celebrating the beauty of washoku—Japanese cuisine. Explore the kaiseki ryori, a multi-course meal inspired by the changing seasons.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Whether it’s a cost-cutting move to save on the Titanic’s rivets or a shortcut taken while building a stadium, it takes just a little carelessness to trigger the deadliest engineering failures in history.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Buckle up as we take you on a wild journey into the world of vintage daredevils who risked it all for a rush. From the enigmatic Human Fly to skateboard speed demons, these stunts were unforgettable.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: The legendary treasures of the Copper Scroll, King Solomon's mines, and the Syamantaka Gem have captivated the world for centuries. But could these vast fortunes still be out there, waiting to be found?

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From colossal walls and giant stone tombs to temples carved from solid rock, how did ancient civilisations achieve feats of engineering that still defy modern understanding?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Throughout ancient cultures, there are stories of god-like beings providing instruction to early humans, helping our ancestors to establish the first civilisations and teaching them. Could it be true?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: A man with aspirations to writing crime novels ends up the star of his own breakout story when he tries to escape from one of Mississippi's oldest and most notorious prison farms, Parchman Penitentiary.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: While on a doomed special mission for Mike in Florida, Robbie and Jersey pick through a mechanical wizard's jaw-dropping stockpile of petroliana and drag-race memorabilia.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: From nightmares linked to unexplained deaths to unconscious visions that seem to predict the future, what hidden powers could be unlocked with a better understanding of this mysterious mental state?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: As new research identifies who may have been behind the Oak Island mystery, the Laginas and their team are stunned by what they find in the Money Pit area.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: The Anonymous Heroes
programme.desc: Carefree drifters Meng Gang and Tie Hu discover their purpose after meeting the revolutionary leader, Wan Tai. With the help of Meng Gang’s girlfriend, they infiltrate a warlord camp to seize weapons for the revolutionary cause. Following a fierce battle, all three make the ultimate sacrifice, becoming the "Anonymous Heroes" of the revolution.

programme.title: Imprisoned 2: There Is No Escape From Fate
programme.desc: Hong Kong businessman Yu and his secretary travel abroad for business meetings. When the secretary is killed in their hotel, Yu is arrested. Despite pleading not guilty, Yu is imprisoned in a cruel multinational prison where the warden enjoys torturing prisoners, and he must find a way to escape from this dark and deadly prison to survive.

programme.title: Lost Love
programme.desc: Mei tries to get over the death of her young son by becoming a foster parent. For 13 years, Mei’s dedication to the foster child leads her to neglect her husband and the true needs of the child. It is only through the child’s unintentional help that the couple finally manages to salvage their relationship.

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government’s secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor’s ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Wu Song is appointed as chief constable after killing a tiger with his bare hands when drunk. The wife of his brother Wu Da Lang, seduces Wu Song but gets rejected by him, and engages in an affair with a rich man. They poison Wu Da Lang when he finds out about their affair. To avenge his brother’s death, Wu Song kills both of them.

programme.title: Opium And The Kung-Fu Master
programme.desc: Tie Qiao San, head of the Ten Guangdong Tigers, is an honourable master with many disciples. As opium becomes popular among the nobles, Tie starts taking it and gradually harms his body. When an opium house’s owner defeats Tie in a fight and he is only saved from being killed by his disciple, Tie vows to quit opium and get back on his feet.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong’s enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: The first spy thriller movie by famous Director Zhang Yi Mou, this film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932. Sold out by a traitor, the agents, who split up into two teams, find themselves surrounded by threats on all sides. Can they complete their mission?

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: Five Shaolin Masters
programme.desc: The Qing court plots to kill all Shaolin disciples by burning down Shaolin Temple. This sudden fire killed almost everyone except for five disciples. To take revenge on the Qing court, the five of them train hard in different fighting styles to become “The Five Shaolin Masters”.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers’ claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: Shaolin Martial Arts
programme.desc: The Qing government assigns fighters to destroy Shaolin Temple and kill all the disciples, but two of them successfully escaped. They train under different masters and learn the Wing Chun and Hung Quan styles respectively, finally killing the fighters and taking revenge for the death of their fellow disciples.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Martial arts master Liang Kun withdraws from the jianghu to protect the woman he loves, but his absence leads to her tragic death. Realising he can no longer escape his fate, he returns to the martial world. With the help of beggar clan leader Su Can, Liang Kun fights his way through ruthless enemies to avenge her.

programme.title: Detective Dee and Nine-storey Demon Building
programme.desc: A series of strange incidents happen at the Tang’s demon building but Detective Dee finds no clue. Dee finds the master of the family suspicious when he speaks with him, and when the eldest daughter Miss Tang secretly informs Dee about Mr Tang’s strange behavior and the fact that she is kept under surveillance, Dee vows to unveil the truth.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian’s rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian’s granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: Table for Six 2
programme.desc: The sequel to "Table for Six", Bernard and Lung plan to get married while their eldest brother is away. Yet, the weddings spiral into a chaotic battleground with escalating family drama, creating a messy affair for everyone involved.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: Legendary Weapons of China
programme.desc: Lei Kung, the leader of the Boxer Clan in Yunnan, dissolves the clan to save his disciples before going into self-exile. The Clan sends various assassins to kill him but failed. They then assigned Kung’s brother Yong to find and kill Kung, leading to a battle between the two brothers.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: Reincarnated Swordsman
programme.desc: A Wu Dang disciple Fu, kills the chief of Wu Dang Clan and frames it on the chief’s illegitimate child, Yun. Fu then proclaims himself the new chief and orders the killing of Yun, who vows to avenge his father’s death and learns the invincible silkworm martial arts style in order to defeat Fu.

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Shaolin Abbot
programme.desc: Monk Chi San is sent by his Shaolin Master to learn a special kung fu skill from a Wu Dang priest. He gets embroiled in a fight between the Qing and Ming camps along the way, and has to gather disciples to rebuild the burnt Shaolin temple at the same time.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: Good Autumn, Mommy
programme.desc: In Lingnan, villager Chen Feng Di’s world shatters when her newborn daughter vanishes during a violent storm. Defying her husband’s resignation and the suffocating silence of village taboos, she embarks on an obsessive search. Her journey becomes a fierce awakening of maternal love and self-reclamation.

programme.title: My Blue Summer
programme.desc: Zhi has been secretly in love with Nan since she met him once as a child. After graduating high school, Zhi realizes that she and Nan are in the same university, where they get to know each other by chance and become close friends. However, Zhi is still too shy to express her love for Nan. Will this long-term crush finally turn into true love?

programme.title: Pass and Goal
programme.desc: After losing everything, a businesswoman starts over in Sham Shui Po, forming a kids’ football team to take on an elite squad. As she rebuilds her life, she inspires her players to believe in themselves and fight against the odds. Together, they strive to rewrite their first half with a second chance at victory and hope.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Clans of Intrigue
programme.desc: Heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, when Gong from the Holy Water Palace appears and accuses Chu of stealing the holy water from her Palace and using it for various murders. Chu denies, and is given a month to find the murderer or be killed by Gong. To prove his innocence, Chu decides to investigate the case…

programme.title: Confinement
programme.desc: Si Ling, a pregnant painter, moves into her dream home after winning an award and hires a confinement nanny. As she begins her one-month confinement after giving birth to her daughter, inexplicable incidents start happening in the house, threatening both her and her baby…

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Come Back Home
programme.desc: In a chilly winter, De and his family goes on a self-drive tour to Changbai Mountain. The holiday turns tragic when De’s eight-year-old son goes missing. He seeks help from the local police but is unable to find his son. Though the golden hour has passed, De and the rescue team insist on continuing the search. Can they finally rescue the boy?

programme.title: The Myth
programme.desc: An archaeologist Jack, and a scientist William, stumble upon ancient Qin Dynasty artifacts that lead them to the mausoleum and mysteriously connects Jack to his past life as a warrior in ancient China, starting their mythical journey.

programme.desc: Kiriboshi daikon-daikon radish that's cut and sun-dried to preserve it. Both tasty and nutritious, it's gaining traction as a health food. Discover more about its unique texture and versatility.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: A Secret Date
programme.desc: It's late at night, when all are fast asleep. A young man and woman huddle together along the veranda outside of a house, attending to a ... rooster. What could the pair be up to?

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: With colorful pile fabric and comfortable knits, Wakayama prefecture is drawing global attention as a textile hub. We bring you striking images of its machines and the beat of its factories.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Summer #5
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: On The Wings 5Min.
programme.desc: Join us on a night flight to admire Japan's stunning views on a journey from Tokyo to Fukuoka. Behold the sublime beauty of Mt. Fuji at sunset and the sparkling night views of major cities.

programme.title: The Invasion
programme.desc: As a Washington psychiatrist unearths the origin of an alien epidemic, she also discovers her son might be the only way it can be stopped.

programme.title: War Dogs
programme.desc: The Wolf of Wall Street's Jonah Hill and Whiplash's Miles Teller star in this dramedy based on a true story that follows two twenty-something Miami stoners who exploit a little-known government initiative during the Iraq War that allows small businesses to bid on U.S. Military contracts. Starting small, they begin raking in big money and are soon living the high life. But the pair gets in over their heads when they land a $300 million deal to arm the Afghan Military -- a deal that puts them in business with some very shady people, not the least of which turns out to be the U.S. Government. Comedy powerhouse Todd Phillips (The Hangover films) writes, directs and produces (with Bradley Cooper) this incredible true story based on a controversial Rolling Stone article.

programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin head to the casino to see if they can game the system with a high stakes dice-throwing hack, and they test some surprising hacks for overcoming snoring and sleeping through the night.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 12
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin explore hacks that could save money on your cable bill, and Hack Master Kosta Grammatis helps Kevin fulfill his childhood laser-blast dreams. Plus, there's an ancient Egyptian hack!

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 13
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke are having dinner in a hot tub… yup, it's exactly what you think. And it's a blast from the past as Kevin re-hacks a self-tanner. Plus, in the new Saved by the Hacks, our teens have let the hacks take over.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 14
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin learn ways to game the system with parking, and the Lazy Cook returns with a recipe for bringing old mac and cheese back to life. Plus, Senora is not the portrait of good behavior in a new Hacks Del Corazon.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 15
programme.desc: Brooke meets a dominatrix who wants to teach a pomegranate a lesson, and Mack and Jack try to help a new couple beat the cohabitation curse. Plus, Kevin and Brooke test a hack that puts your baby to work.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 16
programme.desc: Have Kevin and Brooke finally found the hacked pool of their dreams in "Hack or Wack"? And in "Hack Line of Defense," rude teenagers will no longer spoil the mood, thanks to hacks that will keep them on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 17
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke go dumpster-diving at the drive-thru in "Gaming the System," and Kevin is the hack hunter, as he meets with truckers to find some new everyday hacks. Plus, Señor Solución has a nasty fall on "Hacks Del Corazón."

programme.title: Hack My Life S3 18
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke test hacks for fighting the urge to sprinkle a little tinkle. Plus, which host will be the victor for road trip hacks? And Nurse Hackie has the cure for itchy bites - if she can stay sober long enough to find it.
